name: f2-chat-server
description: Large-scale Chat Backend with AI Bot Integration

scripts.servers: concurrently "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:conn" "npm run start:worker" "npm run start:ai"
scripts.delay: node -e "console.log('⏳ SSH 터널링 연결 대기 중 (3초)...'); setTimeout(()=>{}, 3000)"
scripts.start:all: concurrently --kill-others --names "TUNNEL,SERVERS" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold" "npm run tunnel" "npm run delay && npm run servers"
